title: Fix shutdown black overlay and startup green screen for non-admin users

requirements.text: Fix `ShutdownOverlay.tsx` and its integration in `ChatPage.tsx` so that when the server is shut down (`globalchat_server_state` has `isShutdown: true` and current time is before `shutdownUntil`), non-owner users (any username that is not `AI.Caffeine`) see a full-screen black overlay rendered on top of the entire chat UI. The overlay must display: (1) a large '🔴 Server Shut Down' title, (2) the `shutdownMessage` from localStorage if provided, (3) a live countdown timer formatted as mm:ss that decrements every second showing time remaining until `shutdownUntil`. All message input interaction must be completely blocked while the overlay is active.

quotes: screen not going black and green with text of remaining time of shutdown not coming for non admin users

acceptanceCriteria: When `AI.Caffeine` triggers a shutdown from the Admin Panel, any other logged-in user immediately sees a full-screen black overlay covering the entire chat UI
The overlay displays '🔴 Server Shut Down' as a large title
The overlay displays the shutdown message entered by the admin (if any)
The overlay displays a live countdown timer in mm:ss format that updates every second
The countdown timer accurately reflects the remaining time based on `shutdownUntil` Unix timestamp in `globalchat_server_state`
The message input bar is completely inaccessible/blocked while the overlay is active
The overlay is NOT shown to `AI.Caffeine` (the owner)
The overlay appears immediately when the BroadcastChannel `globalchat_server_control` broadcasts the shutdown event, without requiring a page reload
The overlay disappears automatically when the countdown reaches zero

requirements.text: Fix `StartupOverlay.tsx` and its integration in `ChatPage.tsx` so that when the server transitions from shutdown to running (either via the 'Start Up Server' admin command or natural timer expiry), all non-owner users (`AI.Caffeine` excluded) immediately see a full-screen green overlay displaying '🟢 Server Starting Up...' for exactly 5 seconds. After 5 seconds the overlay fades out and the normal chat UI is fully restored. This must work across all currently open browser tabs for non-owner users.

quotes: screen not going black and green with text of remaining time of shutdown not coming for non admin users

acceptanceCriteria: When the server transitions from shutdown to running, all open tabs for non-owner users immediately show a full-screen green overlay
The overlay displays '🟢 Server Starting Up...' text clearly
The green overlay is shown for exactly 5 seconds before fading out
After the 5-second overlay, the normal chat UI is fully restored and users can send messages again
The startup overlay is NOT shown to `AI.Caffeine`
The startup overlay triggers both when the admin manually clicks 'Start Up Server' and when the shutdown timer expires naturally
The transition is handled via the `globalchat_server_control` BroadcastChannel so all open tabs react simultaneously

requirements.text: Audit and fix the `useServerState` hook and `ChatPage.tsx` to ensure the server state is correctly read from `globalchat_server_state` localStorage on initial page load and kept in sync via the `globalchat_server_control` BroadcastChannel. Specifically: (1) on component mount, read the current server state from localStorage and immediately apply the shutdown overlay if `isShutdown` is true and `Date.now() < shutdownUntil`; (2) subscribe to the BroadcastChannel for real-time state changes and update React state accordingly; (3) ensure the shutdown/startup overlay visibility is derived from React state (not just localStorage reads) so React re-renders correctly when state changes.

quotes: screen not going black and green with text of remaining time of shutdown not coming for non admin users

acceptanceCriteria: If a non-owner user opens the chat while the server is already shut down, the black overlay is shown immediately on page load
If a non-owner user's tab is open when a shutdown is triggered, the black overlay appears in real time via BroadcastChannel without a reload
The countdown timer in the overlay is accurate and starts from the correct remaining time
When the server startup event is received via BroadcastChannel, the black overlay is replaced by the green startup overlay for 5 seconds
No stale state persists between shutdown and startup transitions

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
The overlay must not appear for the AI.Caffeine owner account under any circumstances
The existing localStorage key globalchat_server_state and BroadcastChannel name globalchat_server_control must be preserved
nonGoals: Changing the admin shutdown command UI or logic
Modifying the OwnerShutdownBanner shown to AI.Caffeine
